one_time_description: Land trespass settlement received from William and Edith Goodtrack following Supreme Court of Canada dismissal of leave to appeal; proceeds of $475,079 received August 26, 2021
economic_notes: First Nation holds an 8.3% interest in FHQTC Developments LP (Keseechiwan Holdings LP) with equity value of $419,649. Wood Mountain Legacy Trust assets held off-balance sheet with market value of $48,792,961 (December 31, 2021). Trust governed by appointed trustee and not consolidated.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Wood Mountain Legacy Trust ($48.8M) is excluded from consolidated statements as it is governed by an appointed trustee. No long-term debt. Deferred revenue is comprised of ISC unexpended funds ($1,082,785) and other unexpended funds ($2,948,827) totalling $4,031,612. Land lease settlement of $475,079 is a one-time non-recurring item. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text. Note 2(b) confirms no controlled entities consolidated and no entities on modified equity basis. OSR calculation includes Legacy Trust distributions, land lease settlement, trust fund income, FNT, FHQ Tribal Council, casino dividends, Living Sky CDC, QBOW CFS, interest, other revenue, and prior year unexpended funds transfer.
